title: Reuse Prompt from app card: split Apply into Prompt Box vs App
description: Reuse Prompt on an app-generated card always reopens the app (openAppFromReuse fires unconditionally, ignores all 6 checkboxes). User wants to also inject prompt/images into the Prompt Box. Fix: on app cards, replace single Apply with two same-color buttons — 'Apply to Prompt Box' (honors checkboxes, skips openApp) and 'Apply to App' (current behavior). Non-app cards keep single Apply. One event carrying dest.
